name: Blue Ridge Swim & Tennis Club
description: Blue Ridge Swim & Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Blue Ridge, GA. There are 4 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Fannin County Recreation Department
open_play_schedule: You may also reserve a court M-F 1-3pm by calling Fannin County Rec Dept.  Sat/Sun play subject to change based on other sports. Summer recreation reduces courts from 6 to 3 for 6-8 weeks.
fees: Fee required — $10 for out of county residents. Outdoor courts: open play, no charge

name: Tammen park
description: Tammen park is a place to play pickleball in Morganton, GA. There are 6 outdoor concrete, asphalt, and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to water and restrooms.
